sentences: The kitten is playing with a ball.
mySentence: Yesterday, I saw a cute kitten near my house.

meaning: The state of being alone, especially when it is peaceful and enjoyed.
sentences: She enjoyed the solitude of the forest.
After work, he spent an hour in solitude.
The mountain cabin offered complete solitude.
Sometimes, solitude helps us think clearly.
mySentence: I enjoy a few minutes of solitude every morning before starting my work.

meaning: A flat cooking surface or pan used for cooking foods such as pancakes, eggs, dosa, roti, or burgers.
sentences: She cooked pancakes on the griddle.
The chef heated the griddle before making burgers.
My mother makes crispy dosa on a hot griddle.
mySentence: I bought a new griddle to make dosa and pancakes at home.
